---
title: BsParser
subtitle: "valid'em"
execute:
  echo: false
---

> Validate an bsInput with one super_bcv_wrapper

::: {#inputDiv}
<!-- inputDiv is considered Void-->
:::

```{ojs}
import { bsInputgroupTransform } from "./bsui.js"
import { super_bcv_parser } from "./bsBcv.js";

superBCV = new super_bcv_parser() // instance of singleton parser

viewof refInput = new bsInputgroupTransform({
  prefixHTML: "<i class='bi bi-book'></i>",
  placeholder: "Enter Bible reference…",
//  transform: s => superBCV.osis_array(s),     // <---- HERE
  transform: superBCV.osis_array,     // <---- HERE
  addLabel: "Add",
  resetLabel: "RAZ",
  clipLabel: "CLIP"
}).node()

refInput.current
refInput
```
